edges.evidence_quote: During his reign as boss, Patriarca formed strong relationships with the New York-based Genovese and Colombo crime families
edges.context: Patriarca formed strong relationships with Genovese family.

edges.evidence_quote: His long-time underboss, Enrico Tameleo, was also a member of New York's Bonanno family.
edges.context: Patriarca's underboss was also a member of Bonanno family, indicating a tie.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2010, DiNunzio extorted Rhode Island strip clubs with members of the Gambino crime family.
edges.context: Members of the Patriarca family cooperated with Gambino family members in extorting Rhode Island strip clubs.

edges.evidence_quote: James Martorano — Boston mobster, his brother Johnny Martorano was a member of the Winter Hill Gang.
edges.context: James Martorano is a Patriarca family soldier; his brother Johnny Martorano was a member of the Winter Hill Gang, indicating a familial link between the organizations.

edges.evidence_quote: Since his release, Guglielmetti has been working with Philadelphia family capo George Borgesi.
edges.context: Patriarca family capo Matthew Guglielmetti worked with Philadelphia family capo George Borgesi, indicating cooperation between the two families.

edges.evidence_quote: Weadick was affiliated with both the Patriarca family and the Winter Hill Gang.
edges.context: Paul Weadick was an associate of both organizations, indicating a cooperative link.

edges.evidence_quote: Christian 'Chris' DeMarco ... with alleged ties to the Springfield MA Genovese Crew. As of 2026 it is alleged that DeMarco acts as a 'link' between the Springfield MA Genovese Crew and Patriarca Family
edges.context: DeMarco is suspected of linking the Genovese crew and Patriarca family, suggesting cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: Giso also served as a liaison between Patriarca underboss Gennaro Angiulo and the Winter Hill Gang.
edges.context: Nicolo Giso acted as a liaison between the Patriarca family and the Winter Hill Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The DiNunzio brothers sought refuge in Las Vegas and Los Angeles, where they worked as bookmakers and debt collectors for the Chicago Outfit.
edges.context: Members of the Patriarca family worked for the Chicago Outfit.

edges.evidence_quote: he was dispatched to resolve a dispute with the drug dealer George Pappas, who had defrauded a joint cocaine and marijuana venture operated by the Patriarca family and the Winter Hill Gang.
edges.context: The Patriarca family and the Winter Hill Gang jointly operated a cocaine and marijuana venture.

edges.evidence_quote: He began his career in organized crime as an associate of the Connecticut faction of the Colombo family before joining the Patriarca family's Hartford, Connecticut crew headed by William Grasso.
edges.context: Gaetano Milano moved from the Colombo family to the Patriarca family, indicating a connection between the two families.

edges.evidence_quote: Milano was inducted into the Patriarca family in 1985, and served as the organization's liaison to the Springfield, Massachusetts faction of the Genovese family.
edges.context: Gaetano Milano acted as liaison between the Patriarca family and the Genovese family, indicating cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: The Patriarca crime family is considered an important part of the plot of the 2015 biopic crime film Black Mass, as they are considered the main enemies of the Winter Hill Gang, led by the bloodthirsty James 'Whitey' Bulger.
edges.context: The Patriarca family and the Winter Hill Gang are portrayed as enemies in a bloody feud.
